creator: ak@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Yes, I did it before. But in case of DEVD, the xorg adding SysMouse and trying to probe other devices (e.g. additional keyboard for USB HID mouse, which is normal, but not needed in my case), while logging about blocked devd ums device, which is already configured by /etc/X11/xorg.conf. So, manual configuration is ok, in my case.

Hmm, can you please attach Xorg.?.log for X server with devd config backend enabled and AutoAddDevices turned off?
